name: worktree-integration-test-pattern
description: Pattern for writing integration tests against real SKILL.md files in git worktrees, using git rev-parse --git-common-dir to locate shared build/ artifacts. Use when: (1) adding regression tests for SKILL.md transformers that must run against real file shapes, (2) test modules need to import scripts from a build/ directory not present in the worktree, (3) ensuring fix functions are idempotent on production files.
